subject.name: ContactForm
subject.purpose: Contact page form: name, email, message, submit; confirms inline. Hired out to a freelancer.

exemplars_say: Tell us what you need. We read everything.
exemplars_avoid: Reach out to learn more about our solutions

behavior: Fields: name (text), email (email), message (textarea); submit button
Validate email format client-side; show inline errors
On success, replace the form with a thank-you message

accessibility.keyboard_nav: logical tab order name->email->message->submit; visible focus ring; errors announced

issues_found: Used hardcoded #e11d48 for the error color instead of semantic_error token
Email input was type=text, not type=email
No visible focus ring on the submit button

instructions_for_external_tool: You are generating a component named ContactForm. Purpose: contact page form with inline confirmation. You MUST use ONLY the design tokens provided in brand_context — do not invent colors, fonts, or spacing values. Framework: react + shadcn + tailwind. Return code only. Single file. This is iteration 1 — the previous attempt had these issues to fix: (1) use the semantic_error token, not a hardcoded hex, for the error color; (2) the email input must be type=email; (3) the submit button needs a visible focus ring. Accessibility: heading is an h2; 4.5:1 contrast; tab order name->email->message->submit; errors announced to screen readers.
